subcodes.first_line: O Lord, O Lord! These are Thy honored servants, sincere unto Thee in all affairs. Their steps have been made firm, and they have been illumined [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: رب رب ان هولاء عباد مکرمون مخلصون لک فی جمیع الشئون قد ثبتت اقدامهم و استضائت
subcodes.subjects: @cycles in the physical and spiritual worlds, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @consolation and comfort, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
